title: PotatoSaver
description: 1.21.4–1.21.11 | Minecraft Optimization Modpack That Boost FPS & Performance! 🚀
body:
**Comes with the Modpack .zip FILES!!!**

🔧 Minecraft Optimization Modpack | Boost FPS & Performance! 🚀
Tired of lag and low FPS? This modpack is designed to supercharge your Minecraft performance without sacrificing visuals or gameplay! Featuring lightweight optimizations, FPS boosts, and lag reduction tweaks, this pack ensures a smoother, faster, and more responsive Minecraft experience.

### ✨ Features:
✅ Massive FPS Boost – Optimized rendering & performance tweaks

✅ Better Chunk Loading – Faster world generation & smoother gameplay

✅ Reduced Lag Spikes – Minimized stuttering and memory leaks

✅ Efficient Memory Usage – Lower RAM consumption for better stability

✅ Optimized Entity Handling – Less strain from mobs & animations

✅ Works on Low-End PCs! – Play Minecraft without slowdowns

### ⚙️🛠️ Don't want to create new profiles in for every update? Gotcha!
**We Provide the ModPack .zip file for easier use!**

1. Choose the ModPack Version of your choice and click on it's title.
2. Scroll down to the bottom and you will see a "Files" tab.
3. In there click on the Download Button Next to the File Which has ".zip" at the end.
4. Extract the .zip file to your desktop.
5. Now you can put the files into your ".minecraft" folder.

**_(Please note that the .zip files are not available for/in any Modpack Version before v1.10.4)_**

Are You Ready to experience the NASA pc performance you've been wanting!?!

**Download now and experience Minecraft at peak performance!** 🚀
